signIn.title: Sign In
signIn.termsAndConditions: By proceeding, you agree to the
signIn.securityTip2: Use strong passwords and change them regularly
signIn.securityTip3: Log out when you finish using the system

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your identification to receive a recovery code
forgotPassword.codeSent: If the identification number exists in our system, you will receive an email with instructions.
forgotPassword.securityTip2: Use a unique and strong password
forgotPassword.securityTip3: Do not share your recovery code with anyone

errors.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.serverError: Server error. Please try again later.
errors.somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.

success.mustChangePassword: For security, you must change your password. Please update it as soon as possible.

sessionLock.title: Session locked
sessionLock.description: Due to inactivity, your session was locked. Enter your password to continue.
sessionLock.configHint: You can disable or configure the timeout for this automatic lock in the Settings > Security menu.

semaphores.title: Process semaphores
semaphores.hint: Click a color to filter the table

description.actuacion: List of notifications related to judicial actions.
description.sujeto_procesal: List of notifications related to procedural subjects.
description.actuacion_alerta: List of priority action alerts (consultation, appeal, second instance).

emptyDescription.actuacion: There are no actuación notifications at this time.
emptyDescription.sujeto_procesal: There are no subject notifications at this time.
emptyDescription.actuacion_alerta: There are no action alerts at this time.

confirm.markAllMessage: Do you want to mark {{total}} notifications as viewed?
confirm.markSelectedMessage: Do you want to mark the {{count}} selected notifications as viewed?

gestionProcesos.title: Process Management
gestionProcesos.description: Manage and consult all judicial processes

recommendations.title: Recommendations
recommendations.rule1: The process number must contain exactly 23 digits
recommendations.rule3: Spaces, letters or special characters are not allowed

errors.invalidFormat: The process number must have exactly 23 numeric digits
errors.generic: Error adding process. Please try again.

error.generic: Error adding process. Please try again.

multipleInstances.title: Multiple Instances Detected
multipleInstances.message: This process number has multiple instances. All related processes have been registered.

privateProcesses.title: Private Processes Detected
privateProcesses.messageCount: private process(es) that were not registered.

roleModal.title: Assign Lawyer Role
roleModal.subtitle: Define if your client is plaintiff or defendant in this process
roleModal.infoDesc: The assigned role allows the system to customize alerts and notifications according to your client's legal position.
roleModal.plaintiffDesc: Your client is the one suing

actuacionesRecientes.title: Recent Actions
actuacionesRecientes.description: History of consolidated notifications issued by the system

digest.horizontalScrollHint: You can scroll horizontally in this table

filters.title: Search Filters
filters.noResults: No consolidated outcomes found for the applied filters.
filters.createdAtRangeHelp: Filter by the date when the notification digest was created/published.
filters.processNumberHelp: Find which digests include movements for the entered process/case number.
filters.termStartRangeHelp: Filter by the date when the judicial term starts for the movement.
filters.termEndRangeHelp: Filter by the date when the judicial term ends for the movement.
filters.actionDateRangeHelp: Filter by the judicial action date recorded for each movement.

historialImportaciones.title: Import History
historialImportaciones.description: Review the result of each bulk filing import.
historialImportaciones.empty: No imports have been registered yet.

alertSemafor.linkRoleDesc: Link your role to activate intelligent procedural alerts

alerts.redDemandante: Critical Alert: Risk of withdrawal or serious paralysis (+90 days of inactivity).
alerts.yellowDemandante: Early Alert: Follow-up needed to avoid default (+45 days of inactivity).
alerts.greenDemandante: Process with recent and healthy activity.
alerts.redDemandado: Critical Alert: The case against is advancing; stay alert (recent activity, < 45 days).
alerts.yellowDemandado: Early Alert: Moderate activity; follow-up recommended (45–89 days without action).
alerts.greenDemandado: Favorable Informational: The case against is not advancing (+90 days of inactivity).
alerts.redGeneral: Critical Alert: Judgment, order or termination detected.
alerts.yellowGeneral: Process Alert: Transfer, memorial or notice detected.

green.title: Healthy / Informational
green.desc: Processes with recent activity or favorable inactivity for your role.

yellow.title: Early Alert
yellow.desc: Preventive monitoring (+45 days) or ongoing judicial proceedings.

red.title: Critical Alert
red.desc: Prolonged inactivity (+90 days) or decisive procedural milestones.

error.idNotFound: Process ID not found in route params

instances.title: Process instances
instances.subtitle: Select an instance to inspect its actions

keywords.title: Procedural Stages
keywords.description: Manage procedural stages for automatic alerts in judicial proceedings.

messages.error: An error occurred while processing the request
messages.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this procedural stage?

profile.title: User Profile
profile.description: Update your personal information and password.

messages.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters long
messages.passwordRequirements: To change your password: minimum 8 characters and it must match the confirmation.

process.import_finished_description: The process of importing filings has finished successfully.

securitySettings.title: Security Settings
securitySettings.automaticLockDesc: Protect your session by locking the screen when you are not active.
securitySettings.timeoutError: Enter a valid value between 1 and 120.
securitySettings.manualLockTip: Tip: You can also manually lock your session at any time by clicking the padlock icon next to the notification bell in the top bar.

tasks.title: Judicial Agenda
tasks.description: Manage your tasks, deadlines and commitments related to judicial processes.
tasks.emptyPendingHint: Create a new task to track deadlines, hearings and actions in your cases.

trash.description: Deleted tasks you can restore or permanently remove.
trash.hint: Tasks in trash do not appear in normal lists. You can restore them to their original status or delete them permanently.
trash.emptyHint: Tasks you move to trash will appear here.
trash.confirmForceDelete: This action is irreversible. The task will be permanently removed from the database and cannot be recovered.

urgency.title: Urgency indicator
urgency.hint: Color shows how many days the task has been open since creation.

complete.title: Mark task as complete
complete.message: The task will be archived and removed from pending. You will no longer receive reminders.

form.title: Task Title
form.statusHint: Pending: active with reminders. Draft: saved but inactive. Completed: archived without reminders.
form.statusOnlyHint: Completed tasks cannot be edited. You can only change the status to reactivate them.
form.processPlaceholder: Search by case number or court

messages.moveToTrashError: Could not move the task to trash.
messages.forceDeleteError: Could not permanently delete the task.
messages.completed: Task marked as complete and archived
messages.loadError: An error occurred while loading tasks
messages.taskNotFound: The requested task could not be found
messages.deleteError: Could not delete the task. Please try again.
messages.completeError: Could not mark the task as complete.
messages.error: An error occurred while processing the request
messages.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this task? This action cannot be undone.
messages.confirmMoveToTrash: The task will be moved to trash. You can restore it or delete it permanently later.
messages.confirmStatusChange: Do you want to change the status of this archived task?
